visual_evidence: Human hands off a task card; agent moves through repo folders, files, checklists, tests, workflow timeline, and returns a completed checklist to a human.
semantic_comment: Best match for Devin because it depicts autonomous issue-to-implementation-to-completion handoff.

visual_evidence: Human plus team collaboration, mixed documents/charts/messages feeding an assistant, then shared outputs reviewed by multiple people.
semantic_comment: Reads as collaborative cowork/team assistant more than a code-specific IDE or PR workflow.

visual_evidence: Visible GitHub Copilot wordmark, repo timeline, code suggestion panel, branch/review style workflow, and developer suggestions.
semantic_comment: Explicit logo makes this GitHub Copilot.

visual_evidence: Large IDE window with file tree, editor code, side panels, inline assistant bubble, and user working inside an editor workspace.
semantic_comment: Strong Cursor signal: editor-first coding environment with integrated AI assistance.

visual_evidence: Code/terminal-like dark pane beside a planning flowchart, checks, and assistant helping a single developer through implementation.
semantic_comment: Most resembles Claude Code due to terminal/code-centric single-developer assistance, though it lacks a very explicit shell.

visual_evidence: Broad orchestration board with code editor, repo/file panels, dependency graph, test/check rows, security shield, dashboards, and agent coordinating many artifacts.
semantic_comment: Looks broader than an IDE and less clearly human-completed PR handoff than Devin, so Codex is the best semantic fit.
